overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in winter gear climbing a snowy mountain at night. The character uses a flashlight to navigate through rocky terrain and snow-covered slopes in a desolate, atmospheric environment with overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley between large rock formations

events.description: character passes a marker pole with red fabric lying in the snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow between large boulders, illuminating the path ahead with a handheld flashlight

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation partially covered in snow, towering over the path
steep snow-covered mountain face with visible rock striations and ridges
black cylindrical marker with red fabric material lying on the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy mountain valley flanked by large boulders, using a flashlight to navigate the dark terrain. A marker pole with red fabric lies on the ground ahead, indicating a path or point of interest in the desolate winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky mountain slope with snow patches

events.description: terrain transitions from snow-covered valley to exposed rocky slope with less snow coverage

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill over rocky terrain, carefully navigating between stones and patches of snow

entered.detail: steep rocky incline with scattered boulders and minimal snow
jagged rock face with exposed stone and sparse snow coverage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep rocky slope where snow gives way to exposed stone and gravel. The large boulders from the valley fall behind as the terrain becomes more rugged and open to the night sky, with distant peaks becoming visible.

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent on the rocky ridge, flashlight beam scanning the uneven ground ahead

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible against the dark overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues climbing higher on the rocky mountain ridge, with distant peaks visible against the dark overcast sky. The terrain is predominantly exposed rock with patches of snow, creating a treacherous path upward toward higher elevations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sheltered snowy valley into the exposed, rugged heights of a dark mountain ridge. It begins with the character navigating a desolate valley flanked by large boulders, using a flashlight to illuminate a path marked by a fallen red fabric pole. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from deep snow to a steep slope of exposed stone and gravel, leaving the valley floor behind. The scene then opens up to a treacherous rocky ridge where the landscape becomes increasingly rugged under a dark overcast sky. Finally, the camera continues its upward trajectory, revealing distant peaks as the character climbs higher into the desolate alpine environment.
